description: Annual financial transparency record. One record per year, keyed by the year string. Maps to funding.json funding.history entries.

main.description: A single year's financial summary — income, expenses, and taxes. Supports the same transparency that funding.json history provides, but as individual ATProto records that can be listed via com.atproto.repo.listRecords.

year.description: The calendar year this record covers (e.g. 2024).

income.description: Total income received in the smallest currency unit (e.g. cents for USD).

expenses.description: Total expenses in the smallest currency unit.

taxes.description: Total taxes paid in the smallest currency unit.

description.description: Human-readable narrative for this year (e.g. 'First year accepting donations').

createdAt.description: When this record was created or last updated.
